name: Podis & Podis
description_short: Tennessee-based bankruptcy law firm with 60+ years combined experience offering Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filing services across Middle Tennessee with two office locations.
description_long:
Podis & Podis is a bankruptcy law practice founded by Mark and Cynthia Podis, leveraging over 60 years of combined experience in bankruptcy law. The firm maintains two office locations throughout Middle Tennessee to serve clients facing financial distress, with a focus on helping individuals navigate the bankruptcy process as a path toward financial recovery.

The firm specializes in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filings. They offer free initial consultations to evaluate whether bankruptcy is an appropriate option for individual circumstances. Services include guidance on asset protection (helping clients keep homes and vehicles), Chapter 13 payment plan arrangements tailored to client budgets, and strategies to eliminate payday and flex loans through bankruptcy protection. Phone appointments are available for client convenience.

Podis & Podis distinguishes itself through the extensive personal experience of its founding attorneys and its accessible approach to client service. The firm emphasizes that bankruptcy can provide meaningful relief from financial stress while allowing clients to retain essential assets. Their willingness to work with clients' existing budget constraints through flexible Chapter 13 plans demonstrates a practical, client-centered approach.

A significant limitation is that the firm is currently not accepting new clients, though they continue serving existing Chapter 13 and Chapter 7 clients. Prospective clients interested in their services must call to inquire about availability. The website provides limited detail on fee structures, timelines, or success metrics, which may require direct communication with the firm to fully evaluate their services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 60+ years of combined bankruptcy experience between two founding attorneys
Two physical office locations across Middle Tennessee for local accessibility
Free initial consultation to determine bankruptcy eligibility
Chapter 13 payment plans customized to individual budgets
Phone appointment options for client flexibility
Specific focus on helping clients retain homes and vehicles during bankruptcy
Continuing support for existing clients in both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 cases
cons: Currently not accepting new clients, limiting access to their services
No pricing or fee structure information available on website
Limited details on average case timelines or outcomes
No information about attorney credentials, specializations, or bankruptcy certifications
Minimal content explaining the differences between Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 on the main page
best_for: Middle Tennessee residents facing overwhelming debt and considering Chapter 7 liquidation
Homeowners and vehicle owners seeking to protect assets while filing bankruptcy
Individuals struggling with payday loans and predatory lending seeking Chapter 13 payment plans
diagnosis: Podis & Podis is ideal for Middle Tennessee residents with significant debt seeking experienced bankruptcy counsel to navigate Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 filing. The primary caveat is that the firm is currently not accepting new clients, so prospective clients must contact them directly by phone to determine availability and eligibility.
services: Asset protection guidance for homes and vehicles
Chapter 13 payment plan development tailored to client budgets
Payday loan and flex loan elimination strategies
Ongoing client support and representation in active bankruptcy cases
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
